title: Multi-dataset SSRS report via generate_object additionalDatasets (detail + summary datasets, two TempDB tmp tables, two DP getters)
instruction: In the sandbox model, use generate_object(mode="scaffold", objectType="report", name="DemoNoteReportMulti", caption="@TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote", fieldsHint="NoteId, Subject", additionalDatasets=[{name:"Summary", fieldsHint:"Subject, LineCount"}], generateController=true) to scaffold a multi-dataset SSRS report. The scaffold must produce TWO TempDB tmp tables (DemoNoteReportMultiTmp for the detail rows and DemoNoteReportMultiSummaryTmp for the summary rows), a DataContract, a Data Provider carrying a [SRSReportDataSetAttribute] getter for EACH tmp table, a Controller, an output menu item, and an AxReport whose design references both datasets. Then fill in processReport(): populate the detail tmp table with NoteId/Subject from a local ConDemoNoteHeader variable via insert_recordset, and populate the summary tmp table with one row per distinct Subject plus its count (declare a local table variable before using it in any select -- the bare table name is not a valid select source). All 7 objects must build clean.
